name: tikin-plugin
description: Social-media data for Claude via tikin. Download media and fetch posts, profiles, comments, search results, trends, and analytics across TikTok, Douyin, Instagram, YouTube, Twitter/X, Threads, Xiaohongshu, and more — through tikin's unified REST API using your own tikin API key. Includes onboarding/auth routing, REST best practices, an endpoint-discovery tool over 1,000+ API endpoints, deep platform skills, and task skills (downloader, creator analytics, trend research, social listening, competitor analysis, hashtag research, comment mining, bulk export).
